headline: Insider Trading Ban Threatens $1B Crypto Markets

article.title: 'Maximal' ban on insider trading would hurt prediction markets, says researcher
article.summary: “The same insider trade that improves the accuracy of the price today can reduce the participation that makes the price informative tomorrow,” said Balbinder Singh Gill.

headline: Crypto Plunges 5% on Anthropic AI Safeguards Launch

article.title: Crypto users wary as Anthropic releases Claude Mythos with safeguards
article.summary: Venture capitalist Simon Dedic said Anthropic’s latest AI models drop the cost and skill needed to find crypto exploits to “basically zero.”

article.title: Steadfast Shares Soar as Australian Insurance Broker Gets Offer
article.summary: Australian insurance broker Steadfast Group Ltd received an indicative offer from US specialty insurance distributor Amwins Group Inc., and private equity firm Dragoneer Investment Group LLC, that sent its shares surging by a record 36%.

headline: Indonesia Stocks Rebound 3% on Official Reassurance

article.title: Indonesian Selloff Eases as Officials Rush to Assure Investors
article.summary: Indonesian assets rebounded after officials stepped up efforts to reassure foreign investors, driving the rupiah to its biggest gain in more than a year while easing pressure on bonds and lifting stocks.

headline: $1B Crypto Tax Plans Hit Roadblock in Congress

article.title: Crypto Tax Bills Face Pushback in House Committee Hearing
article.summary: Pro-crypto Democrats questioned staking and mining tax exemptions Tuesday, while party leadership said the bills may need to wait until after the midterms.

headline: EU Fines Meta $1B Over WhatsApp Chatbot Access

article.title: EU Orders Meta to Open WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots—Meta Calls It 'Regulatory Overreach'
article.summary: The European Commission has issued interim measures forcing Meta to restore third-party AI access to the WhatsApp Business API within five days.

headline: Kalshi Demands Employer Disclosure Amid Insider Risk

article.title: Kalshi requires traders to disclose employers to curb insider trading in sensitive markets
article.summary: The prediction markets platform also introduced a risk-scoring system and whistleblower tools to ensure market integrity.

headline: $100M Crypto Laundering Scheme Nets 5-Year Jail Term

article.title: Washington man gets 5 years for helping $100 million crypto money laundering scheme
article.summary: Geoffrey K. Auyeung helped overseas fraudsters launder $100 million in scam proceeds through crypto and bank accounts, according to the DOJ.

headline: Oil Surges 5% on US-Iran Conflict Escalation

article.title: US and Iran exchange strikes after downing of American helicopter
article.summary: Tehran says it targeted US military facilities in Jordan and Bahrain following latest barrage
